title: Contract ingress scope normalization
purpose: Normalize raw ASGI scope data into the contract scope shape before dispatch.

title: Contract ingress event normalization
purpose: Normalize inbound ASGI event data into contract event vocabulary.

title: Contract dispatch binding family legality
purpose: Enforce Binding to Family legality during dispatch.

title: Contract dispatch subevent legality
purpose: Enforce Binding to Subevent and Family to Subevent legality during dispatch.

title: Contract wire-in payload shape
purpose: Decode and validate inbound payload shape for request message stream and datagram families.

title: Contract wire-out payload shape
purpose: Encode semantic results into contract-compatible outbound payloads.

title: Contract egress event projection
purpose: Project semantic results into legal outbound transport event types.

title: Contract emit completion event
purpose: Emit or record transport.emit.complete with contract completion semantics.

title: Contract error event projection
purpose: Project runtime failures into legal transport-specific error events.

title: Contract ingress phase obligations
purpose: Declare contract normalization obligations for ingress phases.

title: Contract dispatch phase obligations
purpose: Declare binding family and subevent legality obligations for dispatch phases.

title: Contract wire phase obligations
purpose: Declare inbound and outbound payload shape obligations for wire phases.

title: Contract egress phase obligations
purpose: Declare event projection obligations for egress phases.

title: Contract emit phase obligations
purpose: Declare outbound send or queue obligations for emit phases.

title: Contract POST_EMIT phase obligations
purpose: Align POST_EMIT with contract completion semantics.

title: Contract error phase obligations
purpose: Declare transport-aware failure projection obligations for error phases.

title: Contract raw ASGI received stage
purpose: Represent the context state before contract normalization.

title: Contract scope normalized stage
purpose: Represent the context state after ContractScope projection.

title: Contract event normalized stage
purpose: Represent the context state after ContractEvent projection.

title: Contract binding matched stage
purpose: Represent the context state after transport binding selection.

title: Contract family validated stage
purpose: Represent the context state after Binding to Family legality validation.

title: Contract subevent validated stage
purpose: Represent the context state after Binding and Family subevent legality validation.

title: Contract op resolved stage
purpose: Represent the context state after KernelPlan op resolution.

title: Contract transport encoded stage
purpose: Represent the context state after outbound contract event encoding.

title: Contract emit completed stage
purpose: Represent the context state after transport completion is observed.

title: Contract request response chain
purpose: Govern the chain shape for rest and jsonrpc unary request response work.

title: Contract server stream chain
purpose: Govern the chain shape for http.stream and sse server-stream work.

title: Contract session message chain
purpose: Govern the chain shape for websocket webtransport and sse session/message work.

title: Contract stream chain
purpose: Govern the chain shape for stream chunk input output and completion work.

title: Contract datagram chain
purpose: Govern the chain shape for webtransport datagram work.

title: Contract lifespan chain
purpose: Govern ASGI lifespan as framework lifecycle rather than OpSpec dispatch.

title: Contract error chain
purpose: Govern transport-specific error projection chains.

title: Contract binding-sensitive edge atoms
purpose: Inject binding-specific atoms at ingress dispatch egress emit and error boundaries.

title: Contract op binding projection
purpose: Project each OpSpec binding into the external contract Binding vocabulary.

title: Contract op family intent
purpose: Declare which contract families an operation binding intends to serve.

title: Contract op stream intent
purpose: Declare stream intent for operations reachable through stream-capable bindings.

title: Contract op message intent
purpose: Declare message intent for operations reachable through message-capable bindings.

title: Contract op datagram intent
purpose: Declare datagram intent for operations reachable through webtransport datagram bindings.

title: Contract op transport neutral core
purpose: Preserve transport-neutral semantic operation execution while bindings carry transport intent.

title: Contract REST binding projection
purpose: Map http.rest and https.rest protos to contract Binding rest.

title: Contract JSON-RPC binding projection
purpose: Map http.jsonrpc and https.jsonrpc protos to contract Binding jsonrpc.

title: Contract HTTP stream binding projection
purpose: Map http.stream and https.stream protos to contract Binding http.stream.

title: Contract SSE binding projection
purpose: Map http.sse and https.sse protos to contract Binding sse.

title: Contract WebSocket binding projection
purpose: Map ws and wss protos to contract Binding websocket.

title: Contract WebTransport binding projection
purpose: Map webtransport proto to contract Binding webtransport.

title: Contract binding exchange normalization
purpose: Normalize tigrbl exchange values to contract exchange values at the conformance boundary.

title: Contract request family
purpose: Govern the request family as a first-class contract family.

title: Contract session family
purpose: Govern the session family as a first-class contract family.

title: Contract message family
purpose: Govern the message family as a first-class contract family.

title: Contract stream family
purpose: Govern the stream family as a first-class contract family.

title: Contract datagram family
purpose: Govern the datagram family as a first-class contract family.

title: Contract family capabilities scope extension
purpose: Project request session message stream_in stream_out and datagram capabilities into ScopeExt.

title: Contract request family subevents
purpose: Govern request family subevents including request and response lifecycle rows.

title: Contract session family subevents
purpose: Govern session family subevents including open accept ready heartbeat sync close disconnect and emit completion.

title: Contract message family subevents
purpose: Govern message family subevents including input decode handle output ack nack replay snapshot and emit completion.

title: Contract stream family subevents
purpose: Govern stream family subevents including open chunk flush finalize abort close and emit completion.

title: Contract datagram family subevents
purpose: Govern datagram family subevents including in handle out ack close and emit completion.

title: Contract subevent binding legality matrix
purpose: Enforce the contract Binding to Subevent legality matrix.

title: Contract subevent family legality matrix
purpose: Enforce the contract Family to Subevent legality matrix.

title: Contract HTTP scope shape
purpose: Project HTTP ASGI scopes into ContractScope with HTTP transport metadata.

title: Contract WebSocket scope shape
purpose: Project WebSocket ASGI scopes into ContractScope with websocket extension metadata.

title: Contract WebTransport scope shape
purpose: Project WebTransport scopes into ContractScope with webtransport extension metadata.

title: Contract lifespan scope shape
purpose: Project lifespan scopes as framework lifecycle inputs rather than operation dispatch inputs.

title: Contract scope transport metadata
purpose: Project transport metadata including binding network secure alpn tls and framing.

title: Contract scope family capabilities
purpose: Project family capability flags into ScopeExt.

title: Contract HTTP event shape
purpose: Project HTTP request disconnect response start and response body events into ContractEvent.

title: Contract WebSocket event shape
purpose: Project websocket connect receive disconnect accept send and close events into ContractEvent.

title: Contract WebTransport event shape
purpose: Project webtransport session stream datagram disconnect and close events into ContractEvent.

title: Contract emit complete event shape
purpose: Project transport.emit.complete into ContractEvent.

title: Contract KernelPlan public lookup shape
purpose: Preserve the public lookup shape KernelPlan.proto_indices[scope][path][method] = meta_index as the canonical dispatch projection.

title: Contract dispatch routing tuple shape
purpose: Govern scope path and method as the canonical routing tuple used for contract-visible dispatch.

title: Contract dispatch binding projection shape
purpose: Project concrete tigrbl proto values to contract Binding values without replacing the public routing tuple.

title: Contract dispatch selector compatibility shape
purpose: Allow internal selector forms such as OpKey proto selector only when they project losslessly to the public routing tuple.

title: Contract minimal exact dispatch lookup
purpose: Require exact scope path method lookup for non-templated routes before any slower matching path is considered.

title: Contract minimal template dispatch matching
purpose: Require templated matching only when exact lookup misses and only within the selected scope and method bucket.

title: Contract JSON-RPC method matching
purpose: Resolve JSON-RPC dispatch by concrete mounted path plus RPC method in the canonical tuple projection.

title: Contract WebSocket connect matching
purpose: Resolve WebSocket connection dispatch through the canonical path and $connect method projection.

title: Contract WebTransport connect matching
purpose: Resolve WebTransport session dispatch through the canonical path and $connect method projection.

title: Contract no transport dispatch bypass
purpose: Forbid app router executor or transport-local semantic dispatch that bypasses KernelPlan lookup and matching.

title: Contract dispatch fast path optimization
purpose: Require compiled dispatch data to provide an O(1) exact lookup path for common scope path method matches.

title: Contract dispatch template index optimization
purpose: Require templated route matching to be indexed by scope and method before pattern evaluation.

title: Contract JSON-RPC dispatch index optimization
purpose: Require JSON-RPC method dispatch to use a mounted-path and method index rather than scanning operation metadata.

title: Contract packed plan dispatch optimization
purpose: Require packed runtime plans to preserve the same canonical dispatch semantics as semantic KernelPlan lookup.

title: Contract dispatch diagnostics shape
purpose: Expose diagnostics that report scope path method binding family subevent and meta index for matched dispatch.
